results.description: Manage isolated Chromium browser profiles across AI IDEs (Claude Code, Cursor, Antigravity) — CLI + MCP server + desktop app
[DEPRECATED] Unmaintained — Gemini CLI's free/Pro/Ultra tiers end 2026-06-18 (Google → Antigravity CLI). MCP server wrapping the official Gemini CLI.

ClickUp MCP Bridge for Google Antigravity & Gemini Code Assist - A platform-independent Model Context Protocol (MCP) bridge connecting Google Antigravity IDE & Gemini Code Assist to ClickUp tasks, spaces, and backlogs.
Give the Google Antigravity keys to your agentic IDE
CLI MCP server for antigravity tooling
A thin, auditable MCP server wrapping the Antigravity CLI (agy). Forward-compatible via extra_args passthrough.
